zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Rothwell於1563年出生在英國藍卡爾霍利時，他的父親John Thomas Rothwell22歲，母親Elizabeth Lomas24歲。他於1586年9月18日與Gillian Draper結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1627年在英國藍卡爾波利享年64歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Rothwell于1563年出生在英国藍卡爾霍利时，他的父亲John Thomas Rothwell22岁，母亲Elizabeth Lomas24岁。他于1586年9月18日与Gillian Draper结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1627年在英国藍卡爾波利享年64岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Rothwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Rowell  . This name was brought to Ireland (Meath) from England in the 17th century.

variants.name: Rowell
meanings: habitational name principally from Rothwell (Yorkshire), but Rothwell in Lincolnshire and Northamptonshire also gave rise to surnames. The placenames derive from Old English roth ‘clearing’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’.
habitational name from Rowell in Chudleigh (Devon), named with Old English rūh ‘rough’ + hyll ‘hill’. The name may have been confused with Roll .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Rothwell was born in 1563, in Chorley, Lancashire, England, his father, John Thomas Rothwell, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Lomas, was 24. He married Gillian Draper on 18 September 1586. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1627, in Bury, Lancashire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Rothwell est né en 1563, à Chorley, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Thomas Rothwell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lomas, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Gillian Draper le 18 septembre 1586. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1627, à Bury, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Rothwell 1563 in Chorley, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thomas Rothwell 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Lomas 24. Er hat am 18. September 1586 Gillian Draper geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1627 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Bury, Lancashire, England und wurde in Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Rothwell è nato il nel 1563 nel Chorley, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John Thomas Rothwell, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Lomas, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Gillian Draper il 18 settembre 1586. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1627, nel Bury, Lancashire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Rothwellが1563年にイギリスランカシュアイアチオルリーで生まれた時，父John Thomas Rothwellは22歳，母Elizabeth Lomasは24歳であった。1586年9月18日にGillian Draperと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1627年にイギリスランカシュアイアブリーで64歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Rothwell(이)가 1563년 영국 랭카실르 초를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thomas Rothwell(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Lomas(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1586년 9월 18일 Gillian Draper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1627년 영국 랭카실르 버이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Rothwell nasceu em 1563, em Chorley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Thomas Rothwell, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lomas, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Gillian Draper em 18 de setembro de 1586. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1627, em Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Rothwell родился в 1563 г. в местности чаурли, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Thomas Rothwell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lomas, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Gillian Draper 18 сентября 1586 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1627 г. в местности бури, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Rothwell nació en 1563, en Chorley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Thomas Rothwell, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lomas, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gillian Draper el 18 de septiembre de 1586. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1627, en Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Lancashire, Inglaterra.
